name: self_evolution_roadmap
summary: Master roadmap for the 5-phase AROS Self-Evolution Integration: Phase 1 (Insight Memory Layer), Phase 2 (Full Skill Lifecycle), Phase 3 (Curator/Executor Decoupling), Phase 4 (RL-Trained Curation via GRPO), Phase 5 (Agentic Skill Retrieval). Derived from MTL (arXiv:2604.14004) and SkillOS (arXiv:2605.06614) gap analysis. Master tracking file lives at AROS_Pipeline_Factory/ROADMAP_SELF_EVOLUTION.md.
